prompt: Run ./.venv/bin/pytest in this project. If tests fail to collect, investigate by listing files in the project root and reading any config (setup.cfg, pytest.ini, conftest.py). Report final pass/fail counts and the first few failure messages if any. Do not modify code.
summary: Use a read-then-write plan for: Run ./.venv/bin/pytest in this project. If tests fail to collect, investigate by listing files in the project root and reading any config (setup.cfg, pytest.ini, conftest.py). Repo. Prefer narrow file inspection, minimal churn, and explicit verification.

steps.title: Survey the workspace
steps.objective: Identify the repo areas and files most relevant to the task.

steps.title: Inspect the critical implementation details
steps.objective: Read the narrowest set of files needed to confirm the current behavior.

steps.title: Apply the smallest coherent code change
steps.objective: Implement the feature or fix with minimal unrelated churn.

steps.title: Verify the result
steps.objective: Check the final state, run the relevant validation, and confirm completion honestly.
